subject: Fermi GBM trigger 151221690 is not a GRB
body:
P. Jenke (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 472408444/151221690
at 16:34:00.82 UT on the 21th of December 2015, tentatively classified 
as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to a 
local particles."
